name: Macaroons/Passover
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flaked coconut, sugar, potato starch, and salt until well combined.
2. Whisk the egg whites in another bowl until they become frothy.
3. Gradually add the beaten egg whites to the dry ingredients, stirring gently until the mixture is smooth and uniform.
4. Stir in the almond extract.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto a greased cookie sheet coated with potato starch.
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for about 20 minutes or until the edges are golden brown.
7. Remove from the oven immediately and place on a platter to cool completely.
These cookies freeze well. For added flavor, you may incorporate chocolate into the batter or add cherries. Alternatively, you can dip the cooled cookies in melted chocolate before serving. The finished cookies should be light gold throughout, with golden edges, but avoid over-baking so they don't brown excessively. During other times of the year, substitute potato starch for flour.
